headline: ₹500-2000 Cr at risk — Adani Power's proposed 70% debt hike raises financial risk and potential cost of capital pressures.
what_matters: P/E compression risk of 5-10% due to market sentiment and higher perceived risk; margin erosion from higher interest costs.
BRSR [MANDATORY], TCFD, COSO ERM, ISSB/IFRS S1 S2; risk of SEBI scrutiny and trading restrictions if disclosure is insufficient.
Cost of capital likely to rise by 20-40bps; possible FII outflows if disclosure is inadequate.
action: Monitor for rating actions, regulatory response, and peer moves; reassess if disclosure or credit rating changes occur.
Opportunity: ESG narrative differentiation via proactive risk disclosure and ERM strengthening
